Google Search & AI Services.product_description: The world's most advanced search engine, now supercharged with generative AI to help users find information, create, and explore the world more intuitively.
Google Search & AI Services.target_audience: Global internet users of all ages, ranging from students and researchers to casual browsers and professional power users.
Google Search & AI Services.visual_identity: Primary Colors: Google Blue (#4285F4), Google Red (#EA4335), Google Yellow (#FBBC05), Google Green (#34A853). Backgrounds should be primarily white or very light gray to emphasize a clean UI. Photography Style: Lifestyle imagery featuring diverse people in natural, well-lit environments, showing technology as a helpful background tool. Typography: Google Sans or Product Sans for headlines; Roboto for body copy.
Google Search & AI Services.exclusion_rules: No dark mode UI in marketing assets unless specifically showcasing a feature. No heavy shadows or skeuomorphic elements. No mention of Bing, DuckDuckGo, or Yahoo.
